title: More Lapis Uses
description: This mod adds new uses for Lapis
body:
For the past 10 years, when lapis were added, they didn't do too much. You could at least enchant tools and armor. So i made this mod to make Lapis Lazuli more useful.
This mod adds so much item such as armor, pickaxes ecc.
Here is the list of all the items:
- Lapis Armor
- Lapis Sword
- Lapis Axe
- Lapis Pickaxe
- Lapis Shovel
- Lapis Hoe
The crafts are the same as you would craft a normal pickaxe.
I hope you enjoy it!!!😊😊
